top_tweets.text: As AI agents accelerate coding, what is the future of software engineering? Some trends are clear, such as the Product Management Bottleneck, referring to the idea that we are more constrained by deciding what to build rather than the actual building. But many implications, like
top_tweets.author: AndrewYNg
top_tweets.name: Andrew Ng
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 加速編碼後，軟體工程的未來趨勢之一是「產品管理瓶頸」：我們更受限於決定要做什麼，而非實際建造本身。許多衍生影響尚不明朗，值得持續關注。

top_tweets.text:
Being a solo-founder:

- 10% coding
- 15% marketing
- 5% operations
- 5% management
- 1% mental control
- 6% UX/UI
- 18% customer support
- 12% sales
- 10% debugging
- 8% product strategy
- 5% finance
- 5% “wtf isn’t this working” existential crisis

top_tweets.text:
Farmer doesn't even realize that this is really a right to repair issue. The placement of the bearing is a design choice that takes away the right to repair. This is a conscious decision by a company to make their product unrepairable.

This is not a "quality" issue. It is a
top_tweets.author: longstoryfarms
top_tweets.name: Long Story Farms, LLC
top_tweets.summary_zh: 引用原文提到洗衣機僅用五年軸承就壞，但軸承與滾筒一體成型無法單獨更換。本推文指出這不是品質問題，而是廠商刻意的設計選擇，剝奪使用者維修權（right to repair）。

context.quoted_text:
The appliance guy told me five years is pretty good on a washer. Five years. 

I bought it in 2019 and the bearing is molded into the drum so you can't just replace the bearing. You replace the whole drum for $900 or you buy a new washer for $985. 

The refrigerator from 1989 sitting in my garage has never been serviced and runs like a top. 

That's your product quality report, folks.

top_tweets.text:
5 signs your SaaS design is costing you money:

1. Users need a demo to understand the product
2. Support keeps answering questions your UI should
3. People sign up and never come back
4. Investors ask what does this actually do?
5. You're embarrassed to share the link

If 2+ of https://t.co/aaa3vYU6qx
top_tweets.author: Tanjim38
top_tweets.name: Tanjim | SaaS Product Designer
top_tweets.summary_zh: 五個 SaaS 設計正在燒錢的徵兆：使用者需要 demo 才懂產品、客服一直回答 UI 該解決的問題、註冊後從不回訪、投資人問「這到底做什麼」、你不敢分享連結。兩個以上就該警覺。

top_tweets.text:
Anyone who thinks "AI = easy mode" honestly just sounds dumb and out of touch.

For context, I’ve been doing product design for 20+ years, including giant brands like Febreze, Swiffer, and Abercrombie with multi-continent supply chains etc. 

I can tell you that AI is by FAR the
top_tweets.author: thefinnmckenty

top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者擁有 20 年產品設計經驗（包含寶僑、Abercrombie 等大品牌），認為「AI = 簡單模式」是無知且脫節的看法。AI 實際上帶來前所未見的複雜挑戰與學習曲線。

top_tweets.text:
Vibecoding with Claude Code gets you a UI, but mastering the platform gets you a product.

It’s not just about architecture, it’s about memory management, concurrency, and how the OS actually thinks.

I’ve distilled years of WWDC into a guide to building apps the way Apple
top_tweets.author: davidcafor
top_tweets.name: Dave
top_tweets.summary_zh: 用 Claude Code 快速生成 UI 只是表面，真正掌握平台需要深入理解記憶體管理、並行處理與作業系統思維。作者將多年 WWDC 精華整理成指南，教你以 Apple 的方式打造 App。

top_products.title: Fellow for iOS
top_products.author: Manuela Bárcenas
top_products.tagline: AI meeting notes for in-person meetings
top_products.summary_zh: 為實體會議提供 AI 自動記錄會議筆記的 iOS 應用程式，協助使用者捕捉面對面討論的重點內容。

top_products.title: Google Chrome Skills
top_products.author: Rohan Chaubey
top_products.tagline: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
top_products.summary_zh: 讓使用者將常用的 AI 提示詞轉換為 Chrome 瀏覽器中的一鍵工具，提升重複性任務的執行效率。

top_products.title: Windsurf 2.0
top_products.author: Chris Messina
top_products.tagline: Introducing the Agent Command Center and Devin in Windsurf
top_products.summary_zh: 推出 Agent Command Center 控制中心並整合 Devin，為開發者提供更強大的 AI 輔助編程環境。

top_products.title: Subagents in Gemini CLI
top_products.author: Rohan Chaubey
top_products.tagline: Gemini CLI now runs specialist subagents in your terminal
top_products.summary_zh: 在 Gemini CLI 命令列工具中加入專業子代理功能，讓使用者可在終端機內執行更精細的專業任務。

top_products.title: Chinilla
top_products.author: alex
top_products.tagline: Design systems, simulate them and watch where they break
top_products.summary_zh: 提供設計系統建模與模擬功能的工具，幫助設計師和開發者識別系統中的潛在問題點。

top_products.title: Subspace
top_products.author: Joe Fernandez
top_products.tagline: All your Agents in one app and persistent context
top_products.summary_zh: 整合多個 AI Agent 於單一應用程式中，並保持持續性的上下文記憶，方便使用者統一管理不同代理。
